items.headline: Amazon Expands Satellite, Cloud And Robotics Investments As Valuation Gap Widens
items.summary: Amazon.com (NasdaqGS:AMZN) plans to acquire Apple’s 20% stake in satellite operator Globalstar as part of an $11.6b satellite communications agreement tied to its Project Leo plans. The company also announced a new multi billion dollar AWS partnership with Pinterest, expanding its cloud reach into a major social media platform.
